name: Janet Jackson
description: American singer, songwriter, dancer and actress (born 1966)
abstract: Janet Damita Jo Jackson (born May 16, 1966) is an American singer, songwriter, actress, and dancer. An influential figure in popular culture, she is known for her innovative works that incorporate socially conscious and sexually provocative themes, as well as her elaborate stage shows.

concerts.label: Benefit: St. Andrew's One Cent Coffee Stands Society

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Griffin
about_quotes.evidence: I actually played with Michael Jackson and Janet Jackson. I played with the Jacksons for a week at Radio City Hall so I got a chance to perform on the bandstand with those people, Michael Jackson and Janet Jackson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Griffin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 12, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Terri Lyne Carrington
about_quotes.evidence: I don’t think I’m the best call for Janet Jackson’s gig or something like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terri Lyne Carrington interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Dorothy Donegan
about_quotes.evidence: my son, who is a great record producer—he produced Janet Jackson
about_quotes.doc_title: Dorothy Donegan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
